clusters.justification: These terms map onto macroscopic co-activations in the anterior insula, amygdala, and subgenual cingulate that govern the processing of emotional valence, mood states, and threat detection.

These concepts share neuro-functional co-activation in frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitries, representing the macro-level computation of subjective value to drive goal-directed choice and behavior.

Bound by their engagement of the Default Mode Network, these terms reflect the macroscopic functional axis of processing internally constructed mental models regarding oneself, personal history, and other agents.
